script_marked_ssml: <speak>We exhaust ourselves trying to construct a life of flawless comfort, <break time="0.4s"/> yet it is this very comfort that silences our soul. <break time="0.6s"/> The moment pain fractures our carefully designed world <break time="0.3s"/> is the exact moment our true awareness begins. <break time="1.2s"/> Let that sink in. <break time="1.5s"/> First, <break time="0.2s"/> we treat pleasure as the ultimate reward, <break time="0.3s"/> but Guru Nanak reveals that unchecked comfort acts as a spiritual sedative, <break time="0.4s"/> numbing our connection to the infinite. <break time="0.8s"/> Then, <break time="0.2s"/> when suffering disrupts our plans, <break time="0.3s"/> we feel abandoned, <break time="0.4s"/> yet this friction is actually the medicine designed to dismantle our exhausting illusion of control. <break time="0.8s"/> Consequently, <break time="0.3s"/> realizing that our personal agency cannot govern the cosmos <break time="0.4s"/> relieves us of the heavy burden of being the doer. <break time="1.2s"/> In this quiet surrender, <break time="0.4s"/> we stop resisting the universe <break time="0.3s"/> and start experiencing its living presence. <break time="1.2s"/> Comment SHABAD below to receive the complete translation <break time="0.3s"/> and start your journey of letting go.</speak>
